texto: But some words to men and women, boys and girls alike: The quality of the work must merit the readers' time and money. Do it for yourself, but make yourself a member of your own audience. There is no other way to evaluate your own progress.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Wendy Pini sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “But some words to men and women, boys and girls alike: The quality of the work must merit the rea…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, advice, comics, útil em momentos de trabalho e comics.
